_meta.description: Master roster for Guide personal instances, team vaults, and channel agents. Source of truth maintained by Gareth in the Obsidian vault. Copied to ~/guide-core/agent-factory/roster.json on the Guide machine.

statusValues.planned: Designed but no build work started
statusValues.building: Actively being built — workspace, templates, or config in progress
statusValues.testing: Built and registered — Gareth testing before handoff to person
statusValues.production: Live and in use by the person

execPolicyValues.denied: No exec/bash access. Agent uses vault_read/vault_write only.
execPolicyValues.restricted: Exec allowed for specific read-only commands in allowlisted paths. ask: always.
execPolicyValues.scoped: Exec allowed for specific commands (e.g. python3 ETL scripts) in scoped paths. ask: always.

securityDefaults._comment: Default permissions applied to all agents unless overridden. ADR-022.

personal._comment: Personal instances — privacy is the priority. No exec. Read-write on personal vault, team vaults, and shared data.
personal.rationale: Personal instances need read-write on all mounted vaults to create and update files on behalf of the user. No exec. guide-outputs/ is append-only (read for personal instances).

channel._comment: Channel agents — read-write on team vault and shared data, post to Slack. No exec.
channel.rationale: Channel agents read shared context and respond in Slack. No need for exec.

main._comment: Guide Main — orchestrator. Restricted exec for system state checks. Read everything.
main.vaultReadScope: All team vaults, all shared, all outputs
main.rationale: Orchestrator needs system visibility but not write/execute capability outside workspace.

pipeline._comment: Pipeline agent (future) — needs exec for ETL scripts. Scoped to guide-data/ paths.
pipeline.rationale: Pipeline runs deterministic Python ETL scripts. Scoped to data paths only.

shared._comment: Shared agents (briefing, scribe, analyst, finance, capitalcore, apex) — no exec.
shared.vaultReadScope: Varies per agent — defined in agent spec
shared.rationale: Intelligence and reporting agents. Read data, produce outputs. No shell access.

exec.description: Claude Max Plus — Nick-approved, reserved for executive instances

domain.description: Wilderness digital budget — standard rate limits for domain users

operational.description: Shared agents and channel agents — Haiku for background, Sonnet for interactive

ashleigh.name: Ashleigh
ashleigh.role: Head of Data and Marketing Analytics
ashleigh.style: Data-first, analytically precise. Owns the data and analytics pipeline. Direct and technically minded.
ashleigh.priorities: Data pipeline integrity, marketing analytics, measurement frameworks, reporting infrastructure, data-driven decision support

reviewRules.factual: Answer directly from data vault and pipeline context.
reviewRules.judgment: Answer with caveats. Flag to Gareth if commercial implications.
reviewRules.outOfScope: Say I do not have that context and offer to flag Gareth.

ashleigh.notes: Bound to data channel agent via Telegram DM on main WildernessGuideBot. Domain tier — no personal bot. Data agent primary owner. Personal instance to follow once apiKeyRef resolved.

nick.name: Nick
nick.style: Capital allocation framing. Plain language, no jargon. Wants proof points and ROI. Data-oriented — asks foundational questions first.
nick.priorities: Capital allocation efficiency, ROI on digital investment, budget pacing, financial rigor, responsible AI/tech investment

reviewRules.factual: Answer directly. Data is in the reports.
reviewRules.judgment: Draft a response and escalate to Gareth via Telegram DM for approval before sending.
reviewRules.outOfScope: Say I do not have that context and offer to flag Gareth.

nick.heartbeat: Weekly Friday 16:00 — capital allocation summary, key metrics, flags
nick.notes: Live on @WildernessGuideNickBot. Onboarding completed. Soul tuning outstanding — agent gave generic capability overview on first session; BOOT.md patched to trigger ONBOARDING.md correctly.
